sections.paragraph:
Original: בּחוּרים בּחרים

Transliteration: bachûrı̂ym bachûrı̂ym

Phonetic: bakh-oo-reem'

BDB Definition:

Bahurim = "young men's village"
  1. a town in Benjamin between Jerusalem and Jericho beyond the Mount of Olives on the way to Jericho

Origin: masculine plural of H970

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
